title: juncus amblyocarpus
intro: Juncus amblyocarpus, also known as the bent grass or creeping rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rush family (Juncaceae). Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Juncus amblyocarpus include treating conditions such as fever, cough, and diarrhea, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it can also be applied topically to the affected area.
